name: PAID INC
summary: PAID, Inc. (PAYD) operates two main business segments: ShipTime, an online platform enabling small and medium businesses to quote, process, generate labels, track, and dispatch courier and LTL freight shipments with discounted carrier rates across North America and globally; and PAID platform products (PaidPayment, PaidWeb, PaidCart, PaidShipping) offering e-commerce website building, multi-channel sales management, payment processing, and shipping solutions. The company serves over 109,300 members and generates revenue through transactions and SaaS offerings.
